case_title: PING MAN FUNG VS. TOMER BENTOVIM ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUNG, PING MAN AS TO DEFENDANT BENTOVIM, TOMER MEISEL, EINAT DOES 1 TO 20 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-24-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-23-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-01-2021
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-24-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-07-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-18-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-18-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-07-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN FEES AND COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 100127260)
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FUNG, PING MAN
